game.title: La aventura al aeropuerto
game.story_connection: Coco and Mango are late! Run through the city to catch the airport bus before it leaves

mechanics.core_loop: Run through obstacles to reach the bus stop before the countdown ends
mechanics.bus_warning: Bus starts leaving at 10 seconds remaining

visuals.background: City street scrolling, buildings, airport signs
visuals.bus: Visible at end, starts pulling away at 10s
visuals.urgency: Screen edges pulse red when time low

instructions_text: ¡Corre al aeropuerto! Salta, deslízate y esquiva los obstáculos. ¡No pierdas el autobús!
